mapper.select: SELECT fk.id as fee_key_id, fk.name as fee_key_name, fv.id as fee_value_id, fv.name as fee_value_name, fv.unit as fee_unit FROM apartment_fee_value afv LEFT JOIN fee_value fv ON afv.fee_value_id = fv.id LEFT JOIN fee_key fk ON fv.fee_key_id = fk.id WHERE afv.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} AND afv.is_deleted = 0 AND fv.is_deleted = 0 AND fk.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY fk.id, fv.id
